description: JVM heap, thread count, CPU cores, and disk utilization for Nexus Repository Manager via the Atlas system-information API
technicalNotes: Queries GET /service/rest/atlas/system-information which requires the nx-atlas-all privilege. Extracts JVM runtime metrics from system-runtime section and disk metrics from the first entry in system-filestores array.
name: Nexus_System_Resources
